name: solana-agent-frameworks-skill
description: Comparative guide + runnable cookbook for shipping AI agents on Solana. Covers ElizaOS, Lucid Agents, Swarms, ZerePy, SendAI solana-agent-kit, x402, Solana Actions/Blinks, Dialect messaging, and agent-wallet providers. Verified against live sources 2026-06-24.
author: AceVikings
